football.title: Academorix for Football
football.description: Run football academies of every size — from local grassroots clubs to full multi-branch networks. Squads, matches, formations, and per-position performance in one place.

features.title: Squads by age & level
features.description: U8s to U18s, first team to reserves — build the pyramid your club needs and let athletes move up as they grow.

features.title: Training + fixtures
features.description: Weekly training blocks and league fixtures on one calendar. RSVPs from guardians before every kick-off.

features.title: Formation builder
features.description: Draft starting XI + subs per fixture. Save formations as templates and reuse them across squads.

features.title: Per-position performance
features.description: Configurable attribute sets for GK / DEF / MID / FWD. Track pass %, shots on target, tackle wins — the numbers that matter for each role.

features.title: League tables
features.description: Internal competitions and inter-branch tournaments with automatic standings, top scorers, and clean sheets.

features.title: Membership fees
features.description: Seasonal, monthly, or match-pack fees with family discounts and automatic renewal reminders.

testimonial.quote: We track pass %, shot conversion, and tackle wins per position now. Previously we did none of this because the tools didn't fit football.
testimonial.author: Sara Nassar

related.title: Attribute engine
related.description: How sport-agnostic forms work under the hood.

swimming.title: Academorix for Swimming
swimming.description: Lane management, splits, meets, and per-stroke time series — everything a swimming academy needs, from learn-to-swim through competitive squads.

features.title: Lane management
features.description: Assign swimmers to lanes based on level and stroke. Move them between sets as they progress within a session.

features.title: Split & PB tracking
features.description: Log per-length splits, personal bests, and season targets. Automatic PB detection with family notifications.

features.title: Meet scheduling
features.description: Manage entries for internal galas and external meets. Auto-generate heat sheets and result cards.

features.title: Per-stroke performance
features.description: Freestyle, backstroke, breaststroke, butterfly — separate attribute sets so you're never comparing apples to oranges.

features.title: Level progression
features.description: Stage-based curricula (Learn to Swim → Improvers → Squads). Awards + certificates auto-generated on completion.

features.title: Pool session reminders
features.description: Guardians get reminders with the exact time and lane 30 minutes before each session.

testimonial.quote: Academorix replaced three tools and a stack of spreadsheets. Our coaches finally spend their time coaching.
testimonial.author: Layla Haddad

basketball.title: Academorix for Basketball
basketball.description: Rosters, minutes played, per-quarter stats, and league management — purpose-built for basketball academies running youth, high-school, and prep programs.

features.title: Rosters + rotations
features.description: Build 12-player rosters with starting five and bench rotations. Track minutes played per game and per season.

features.title: Per-quarter stats
features.description: Points, rebounds, assists, steals, blocks, turnovers — logged per quarter, aggregated per game and season.

features.title: League play
features.description: Internal leagues + inter-branch competitions with automatic standings, playoffs, and bracket generation.

features.title: Practice + game calendars
features.description: Practices, film sessions, and games on one calendar. Court bookings integrated with facility availability.

features.title: Shot charts
features.description: Track shot attempts + makes with court coordinates. Heat maps show hot zones per player.

features.title: Recruit tracking
features.description: Track prospects, evaluate them at events, and manage the pipeline from scout to signing.

tennis.title: Academorix for Tennis
tennis.description: Ladders, court bookings, match rating systems, and per-player stroke tracking — everything a tennis academy needs to run competitive and recreational programs.

features.title: Player ladders
features.description: Automatic ladder rankings from match results. Weekly challenge matches move players up and down the ladder.

features.title: Court bookings
features.description: Reserve courts for lessons, matches, or open play. Integrated with your academy's court availability.

features.title: Tournament management
features.description: Round-robin, single-elimination, and consolation brackets. Auto-generated draws and match schedules.

features.title: Match rating (UTR-style)
features.description: Elo-style rating updated after every match. Handicap younger players against older opponents fairly.

features.title: Per-stroke evaluations
features.description: Coach-side attribute sets for forehand, backhand, serve, volley, and movement — track technique over time.

features.title: Level progression
features.description: Red → Orange → Green → Yellow ball progression for junior programs, with automatic level-up triggers.

martial-arts.title: Academorix for Martial Arts
martial-arts.description: Belt progression, grading schemes, and dojo-first workflows for karate, taekwondo, judo, jiu-jitsu, and more. Sport-agnostic engine adapts to your style.

features.title: Belt & grading progression
features.description: Configurable belt schemes with prerequisites, testing dates, and automatic certificate generation on grading pass.

features.title: Grading exams
features.description: Schedule grading exams with panel assignments, video capture, and per-technique scoring.

features.title: Tournament entries
features.description: Manage entries for open and closed tournaments. Weight class + belt division seeding automated.

features.title: Kata & form libraries
features.description: Video library of katas and forms tied to belt levels. Athletes can review any technique from their profile.

features.title: Multi-style support
features.description: Karate, taekwondo, judo, BJJ, aikido — one platform, sport-specific belt schemes and terminology per style.

features.title: Family memberships
features.description: Common in martial arts — one guardian, multiple children on family plans with sibling discounts.

gymnastics.title: Academorix for Gymnastics
gymnastics.description: Apparatus scoring, meet management, and progression schemes for artistic, rhythmic, and trampoline gymnastics. Compliant scoring systems built in.

features.title: Apparatus scoring
features.description: Vault, uneven bars, balance beam, floor — code of points + difficulty scoring, execution deductions, and neutral deductions.

features.title: Level progression
features.description: Level 1 → 10, elite, and international elite. Prerequisites tracked automatically as gymnasts complete skills.

features.title: Meet management
features.description: Manage entries for local, regional, and national meets. Squad selection based on all-around scores.

features.title: Skill libraries
features.description: Track which skills each gymnast has mastered. Auto-suggest the next progression based on level.

features.title: Elite tracking
features.description: Dedicated dashboards for elite squads — hours trained, injury reports, and international qualification progress.

features.title: Safeguarding built in
features.description: Given the age of most gymnasts, safeguarding is first-class — pickup verification, guardian consent, incident logs.
